title: PayPal PYPL Stock Price Target And Forecast Analysis
text: Zacks provides comprehensive stock price targets and forecasts for PayPal Holdings. Consensus rating remains Hold. Analysts maintain cautious views given macro uncertainty. Forward earnings estimates reflect mid-single-digit EPS growth. Revenue growth forecast in low-to-mid single-digit range. Key metrics monitored include payment volume growth, transaction margin dollars, operating margin expansion, and free cash flow generation.
